svg.title: Perception Mapper — SaaS architecture and roadmap
svg.desc: Five-layer architecture diagram showing clients, API gateway, backend services, AI engine, and data layer, followed by subscription tiers and a six-phase development roadmap.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the web app stack')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the mobile app stack')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the desktop app stack')
sendPrompt('Tell me about API client access')
sendPrompt('How does the API gateway work?')
g.text: Cloudflare CDN + WAF → AWS API Gateway

svg.text: Infrastructure: AWS ECS Fargate · GitHub Actions CI/CD · Terraform IaC · CloudWatch
Global regions: ap-south-1 (primary) · us-east-1 · eu-west-1 · Cloudflare edge cache
